agent_actions: read current user intent and normalize change scope
update change.md with background, scope, non-goals, impact, risk, rollback
update spec-delta.md with REQ ids and scenarios
update design.md with DES ids, RISK ids, task split, and coverage mappings
update tasks.md with smallest shippable TASK rows
spec-brief.confirmation_prompt: 方案文档已更新，是否确认进入实现阶段？

agent_actions: implement code according to approved TASK ids
keep task status aligned with actual implementation progress
preserve REQ/DES/RISK/TASK traceability in code and docs
write four-view review conclusions
write white-box test review with CASE to REV or TEST-RISK linkage
record audit results and validation commands
capture reusable lessons in error-memory.md
review-pack.confirmation_prompt: 评审和测试材料已补齐，是否确认进入 verify？

agent_actions: run scripts/specClawd-verify.sh on the active change
stop on failure and report blocking issues
if verify passes, move to commit-summary confirmation
verify.confirmation_prompt: verify 已通过，是否确认生成 commit summary？

agent_actions: write commit-summary.md from verified artifacts
keep validation results consistent with audit and test-review
include traceability section
commit-summary.confirmation_prompt: commit summary 已生成，是否确认进入 archive？

agent_actions: sync long-term specs from spec-delta.md
complete archive.md traceability summary
run scripts/specClawd-archive.sh on the active change
if archive checks pass, mark workflow completed
